content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.94% with broad-based participation (Auto +2.38%, IT +1.40%, Banking constructive). India VIX down 7% to 16.78 indicates risk-on. Existing book is +0.86% on the day with 8 of 8 holdings near or above water. Focus this tick is trailing stops on winners and managing the open pending orders, not adding fresh exposure (already 50% deployed and recent 5-day win rate is poor at 14%).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.0%. Stock pulled back today to 1035 from 1050 high. Current SL at 1028 is good but I want to lock more gains. Tightening SL to 1015 (still above entry 984 by 3.2%) protects ~3% profit while leaving room for normal volatility. Target 1110 unchanged — strong Q4 (PAT +18%, GNPA<1%) supports continuation toward 52w high 1141."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.9%, well above SL 119. Risk-on day pressuring gold but structural supports intact (geopolitical, central bank buying). SL already tight; no change warranted. Will reassess if breaks 122 decisively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Wait — current SL is already 1438 (above entry 1412.94, breakeven+). No-op MODIFY would be wasted. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.8%, below 2% trail trigger. SL 398 (1.6% below entry) is appropriate. Q4 results May 15 — let position run. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.1%. SL 1742 is already above entry 1734 (tight breakeven+ trail). Organon deal optimism largely priced in but pharma defensive bid intact. Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, near flat. SL 316.50 (1.2% below entry) reasonable. Power demand record 256 GW supports thesis. No action needed yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.4%. SL 465 (0.85% below entry) already tight. Q4 PAT +11%, dividend Rs 5.25/share supportive. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%. Tomorrow (Apr 30) is dividend record date Rs 11/share — stock will go ex-div. Q4 PAT +68% strong. SL 598 (2.3% below entry) correct. Hold through ex-div."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 1028 (which would have been hit on today's pullback) — wait, 1028 has held. Re-evaluating: actually current SL 1028 is above today's low 1034.35... no, low was 1034.35 so SL didn't trigger. Keeping SL at 1028.02 still locks +4.5%. Will trail up only if stock makes new high above 1050."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+ (1438 vs entry 1412.94). Target 1485 only 2% away — let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1742 (above entry). No further action."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater but well above SL. Hedge value retained."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Move not yet 2%, no trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near-flat, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL tight, let dividend/Q4 momentum play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Holding into ex-dividend date tomorrow."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK (+6% on Q4 results, NIM expansion, profit swing-back) is the most attractive new setup but I already have 50% deployed and 5-day P&L is poor — passing on new entries this tick. BANDHANBNK and MARUTI flagged as quality setups for future ticks if broader market confirms uptrend. ATGL: avoid (P/E 100x vs peers 12-15x, APM gas allocation cuts). TATACHEM gap-up without volume support — skip. Pending order GLENMARK BUY @ 2400 needs review next tick — if not filled and stock has run away, will cancel.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned: 8 holdings, 7 green, all SLs in place, sector-diversified across financials/FMCG/energy/pharma/metals. Cash 50%, deployable headroom 30%. Recent 5-day stats are concerning (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x) — this argues strongly for fewer, higher-conviction trades and aggressive SL management on existing positions rather than adding new exposure. Three open BUY orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) are stale (>5 hours old for GLENMARK, ~2 days for others) — will explicitly cancel them next tick if still unfilled and price has moved. Daily loss limit fully intact at INR 75,319 remaining."
}
